methodsAttempted.query: site:univr.it Universita di Verona intelligenza artificiale studenti didattica esami generativa policy
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found the official AI guidelines PDF as the top result and several unrelated official concorsi pages.
Exact-title search found the guidelines PDF, the rectoral decree PDF, and the official Atti generali registry page.
The Atti generali page lists the AI guidelines under regulations for information services and artificial intelligence.

artifacts.summary: Official University of Verona sources were found on univr.it/docs.univr.it: the AI guidelines PDF, a rectoral decree issuing those guidelines, and the Atti generali registry page. A generic official concorsi page was rejected as unrelated.

Decreto Rettorale - Emanazione delle Linee Guida di Ateneo sull'uso e l'adozione dell'Intelligenza Artificiale

artifacts.claimText: Verona University's AI guidelines say AI use must be explicitly declared, including the tool used, for exams, research, administrative documents, or other content.

citation.citationTitle: Linee guida per l'uso dell'Intelligenza Artificiale nell'Universita degli Studi di Verona
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: For students, Verona University's AI guidelines say AI may help with studying but may not be used to complete entire exams or theses without explicit instructor authorization.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Students may not use AI for entire exams or theses without explicit authorization

citation.citationTitle: Linee guida per l'uso dell'Intelligenza Artificiale nell'Universita degli Studi di Verona
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: Verona University's AI guidelines prohibit entering personal data without a suitable legal basis, special-category personal data except as allowed by applicable rules, or confidential/secret information into AI systems.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Personal, special-category, and confidential data restrictions

citation.citationTitle: Linee guida per l'uso dell'Intelligenza Artificiale nell'Universita degli Studi di Verona
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: Verona University's AI guidelines say important decisions cannot be entrusted entirely to AI, and decisions with legal effects or significant rights impacts require human supervision and validation.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Human supervision required for important rights-affecting decisions

citation.citationTitle: Linee guida per l'uso dell'Intelligenza Artificiale nell'Universita degli Studi di Verona
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: For research, Verona University's AI guidelines say AI may support data analysis, literature work, and writing, but an AI system can never be considered an author or coauthor of scientific publications.
artifacts.normalizedValue: AI may support research but cannot be author or coauthor

artifacts.sourceTitle: Linee guida per l'uso dell'Intelligenza Artificiale nell'Universita degli Studi di Verona
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Ogni uso dell'IA deve essere dichiarato esplicitamente. Che si tratti di un esame, una ricerca, un documento amministrativo o qualsiasi altro contenuto: se hai usato l'IA, devi dirlo chiaramente, indicando quale strumento hai utilizzato.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Every use of AI must be explicitly declared, including the tool used.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Linee guida per l'uso dell'Intelligenza Artificiale nell'Universita degli Studi di Verona
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Per gli studenti: L'IA può aiutarti nello studio: brainstorming, revisione linguistica, organizzazione delle idee. NON puoi usarla per svolgere interamente esami o tesi senza autorizzazione esplicita del docente.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: For students, AI may help with study tasks, but cannot be used to complete entire exams or theses without explicit instructor authorization.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Linee guida per l'uso dell'Intelligenza Artificiale nell'Universita degli Studi di Verona
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: VIETATO inserire in sistemi di IA: Dati personali senza una base giuridica idonea; Dati personali appartenenti a categorie particolari; Informazioni riservate o coperte da segreto.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The guidelines forbid entering personal data without a suitable legal basis, special-category personal data, or confidential/secret information into AI systems.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Linee guida per l'uso dell'Intelligenza Artificiale nell'Universita degli Studi di Verona
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Nessuna decisione importante può essere affidata interamente a un sistema di IA. Regola fondamentale: decisioni che hanno effetti giuridici o che influenzano significativamente i diritti delle persone richiedono sempre supervisione e validazione umana.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Important decisions cannot be fully entrusted to AI; legally or rights-affecting decisions require human supervision and validation.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Section 2, La decisione finale e sempre umana

artifacts.sourceTitle: Linee guida per l'uso dell'Intelligenza Artificiale nell'Universita degli Studi di Verona
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Ricerca: L'IA può supportare analisi dati, letteratura, scrittura. Supervisione umana obbligatoria su tutto ciò che l'IA genera. Un sistema di IA non può mai essere considerato autore o coautore di pubblicazioni scientifiche.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: For research, AI may support data analysis, literature, and writing, but human supervision is required and AI cannot be an author or coauthor.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow disclosure claim directly supported by the official Italian AI guidelines.
Approved as a student-scoped academic integrity claim; it does not infer broader sanctions beyond the source wording.
Approved as a privacy/data-handling claim based on the explicit prohibited-data list in the official guidelines.
Approved as a human-oversight claim limited to important decisions and legal or rights-affecting impacts.
Approved as a research-scoped authorship and supervision claim from the official guidelines.

artifacts.title: Verona University AI Guidelines Staged Claims
artifacts.summary: Staged five agent-reviewed claims for Verona University from official Italian AI guidelines: AI-use disclosure, student exam/thesis limits, privacy/data restrictions, human oversight for important decisions, and research authorship limits.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.

The operational details referenced by the Verona guidelines for teaching, research, and administration may be provided in separate future guidance and were not found as separate official sources in this run.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
